title: Direttiva mill-Ministru tal-Finanzi, l-Ekonomija u Investiment għall-Ħruġ ta' Euro 100,000,000 Stock tal-Gvern ta’ Malta
title_en: Direttiva mill-Ministru tal-Finanzi, l-Ekonomija u Investiment għall-Ħruġ ta' Euro 100,000,000 Stock tal-Gvern ta’ Malta
description: Official text from legislation.mt (eli/sl/161.122/mlt, expression eli/sl/161.122/20110817/mlt).

provisions.title: L-AVVI| LEGALI 275 tal-2010
provisions.content:
It-titolu ta’ din id-Direttiva hu Direttiva mill-Ministru talFinanzi, l-Ekonomija u Investiment g]all-}ru[ ta’ Euro
100,000,000 Stock tal-Gvern ta’ Malta.

provisions.title: Titolu
provisions.content:
G]andu jin]are[ ammont ta’ Euro 100,000,000 Stock talGvern ta’ Malta kif [ej:

}ru[ ta’ Stock.

(a) 3.75% Stock tal-Gvern ta’ Malta 2015 (VI) Fungibility
Issue, u
(b) 4.6% Stock tal-Gvem ta’ Malta 2020 (II) Fungibility
Issue, u
(`) 5.25% Stock tal-Gvern ta’ Malta 2030 (I), jew
(d) f’ammonti mit-tliet Stocks imsemmija hawn qabel
b’valur nominali flimkien ta’ Euro 100,000,000.

provisions.title: Titolu
provisions.content:
Il-]ru[ ta’ Stocks ser isir kif stipulat fil-prospett.

Mod tal-]ru[ ta’
Stocks.

provisions.title: Stocks
provisions.content:
Kull persuna u, jew enti jistg]u japplikaw g]al dawn liStocks. It-tqassim tal-iStocks isir kif hemm spjegat fil-prospett.

Policy dwar lallokazzjoni ta’
Stock.

provisions.title: Stock
provisions.content:
(1) Ta]t id-disposizzjonijiet tal-Att dwar is-Swieq
Finanzjarji, meta dawn l-iStocks ji[u allokati, g]andha ssir
applikazzjoni sabiex kull Stock jitqieg]ed fuq il-lista uffi`jali u
biex ikun negozjat fil-Bor\a ta’ Malta.

Negozju fil-Bor\a
ta’ Malta.
Kap. 345.

(2) Fit-3 ta’ Di`embru, 2010 wara l-pagament tal-ewwel
img]ax, kull ammont allokat fit-3.75% Stock tal-Gvern ta’ Malta
2015 (VI) FI ji[i integrat mal-]ru[ e\istenti ta’ dan l-iStock u wara,
dawn i\-\ew[ Stocks jitqiesu b]ala Stock wie]ed.
(3) Fil-25 ta’ Ottubru, 2010 wara l-pagament tal-ewwel
img]ax, kull ammont allokat fl-4.6% Stock tal-Gvern ta’ Malta
2020 (II) FI ji[i integrat mal-]ru[ e\istenti ta’ dan l-iStock u wara,
dawn i\-\ewg Stocks jitqiesu b]ala Stock wie]ed.

provisions.title: Stock
provisions.content:
Is-somma ta’ flus li g]andha tin[abar bl-iStocks
imsemmija flimkien tkun ta’ Euro 100,000,000. L-Accountant
General jirriserva d-dritt li j\id is-somma li g]andha tin[abar
b’ammont ta’ mhux i\jed minn Euro 50,000,000.

Somma ta’ flus li
g]andha tin[abar.

provisions.title: g]andha tin[abar
provisions.content: (1) L-img]ax bir-rata ta’ Euro 1.875 g]al kull Euro 100,

provisions.title: Ottubru, 2010
provisions.content:
(1) It-3.75% Stock tal-Gvern ta’ Malta 2015 (VI) ji[i mifdi
b’parità fit-3 ta’ Di`embru, 2015.
(2) L-4.6% Stock tal-Gvern ta’ Malta 2020 (II) ji[i mifdi
b’parità fil-25 ta’ April, 2020.
(3) Il-5.25% Stock tal-Gvern ta' Malta 2030 (I) ji[i mifdi
b’parità fit-23 ta’ {unju, 2030.
